subcodes.first_line: The Book beareth witness that He hath come upon the clouds, yet the people remain in heedlessness and discord, clinging to vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الکتاب بانه اتی علی السحاب ولکن القوم فی غفله و شقاق تمسکوا بالاوهام بعد
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
